page_content:
Repeatable to: 3 credits.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

SPAN401 Advanced Composition | (3 Credits)

Compositions and essays with emphasis on stylistics, idiomatic and syntactic structures. Organization and writing of research papers. Prerequisite: SPAN302; or permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.
